paper_title: Drill Site Description and Seismic Data

methods.description: This method involves correlating horizons and unit characteristics between seismic records of drill sites and the continental shelf using multichannel seismic profiles. It is used to understand the stratigraphic architecture and ages of sedimentary sequences.

steps.description: Perform correlation of horizons and unit characteristics between the seismic records of the drill sites and the continental shelf through a series of multichannel seismic profiles.
steps.searchable_summary: correlate seismic horizons between drill sites and continental shelf

steps.description: Careful reprocessing of line AWI-20100132 to solve issues with correlation across the middle and upper slope.
steps.searchable_summary: reprocess seismic line AWI-20100132 for better correlation

steps.description: Apply frequency-wavenumber (f-k) and Radon transform filtering to suppress seafloor multiples.
steps.searchable_summary: apply f-k and Radon transform filtering to suppress seafloor multiples
